title: Authenticate a user
description: This example demonstrates how to authenticate a user in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API and check the authentication with a token received.

title: Copy or move a file to a folder
description: This example demonstrates how to copy or move a file in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace.

title: Create and open a new file
description: This example demonstrates how to create a new file inside a specific folder in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Create a room and invite a user
description: This example demonstrates how to programmatically create a new room in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace and invite a user to it via email with specific access permissions.

title: Create a text file
description: This example demonstrates how to create a `.txt` file in a specified folder in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Create a virtual data room (VDR) with a watermark
description: This example demonstrates how to create a Virtual Data Room (VDR) in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Duplicate files and folders
description: This example demonstrates how to duplicate one or more files and folders in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Get folder and room contents
description: This example demonstrates how to retrieve the contents of a folder or room in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace.

title: Get login history
description: This example automates the retrieval of the last login events in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace.

title: Invite users
description: This example automates the process of creating new users and sending them invitations in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace.
